hero_desc: Share your experience at the hospital so we can improve and develop our healthcare services. A secure and confidential survey that takes no more than 3 minutes.
please_fill_info: Please fill in the following information before starting the survey
survey_submitted_success: Your survey has been submitted successfully
thank_you_desc: Your kind feedback helps us provide better healthcare. We always strive to improve our services to ensure you have the best possible experience.
health_wish: We wish you health and well-being and look forward to serving you always
select_appropriate_survey: Select the appropriate survey to rate your experience
which_survey_title: Which survey would you like to fill out?
survey_selection_desc: Choose the appropriate survey for your experience at the hospital. Your opinion helps us improve our services.
no_available_surveys: No surveys available at the moment
follow_up_reason: Please explain the reason for this low rating (Optional)
alerts_review_tickets: Please review the tickets section to take necessary actions
viewing_dept_stats: You are viewing statistics and responses for your department only
hourly_hint: This chart helps identify peak hours that may affect service quality
daily_quality: Service Quality by Day of Week
daily_hint: Statistical analysis comparing performance on holidays vs. working days
no_data_desc: No survey responses have been recorded yet. Statistics and charts will appear here once patients start submitting their feedback.
manage_surveys_desc: Create new surveys or edit existing ones
manage_users_desc: Add, edit, and delete users and permissions
general_settings_desc: Customize hospital info, departments, and basic data
login_subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the system
export_subtitle: Choose the required format and options
export_save_file_desc: The file will be downloaded automatically. You can move it to any folder after downloading
export_print_desc: The print window will appear where you can select a printer or save as PDF
responses_search_placeholder: Search by department, name, or phone number...
settings_allow_anonymous_desc: Allow users to submit surveys without entering personal details
settings_require_all_desc: Make all survey questions mandatory to answer
settings_show_progress_desc: Show progress indicator while filling out the survey
settings_enable_thank_you_desc: Show thank you page after completing the survey
settings_thank_you_message_placeholder: Message shown to the user after completing the survey
settings_show_language_toggle_desc: Show language toggle button in the header.
settings_demo_desc: This is an example of the appearance
settings_reset_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default values?
survey_status_desc: Activate the survey to show to users
survey_name_required_desc: Mandatory - Patient cannot proceed without entering their name
survey_phone_required_desc: Mandatory - Must enter 9 digits starting with 7
survey_medical_tips_title: Medical Tips for Patient (Bonus after completion)
survey_tip_placeholder: Example: Drink 8 glasses of water daily
survey_no_tips: No tips added to this survey
survey_leave_empty_for_all: (Leave empty to apply to all departments)
survey_no_surveys_desc: Start creating your first survey to gather patient feedback
survey_delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this survey? This action cannot be undone.
user_err_fill_all: Please fill in all required fields
user_err_password_required: Password is required for the new user
user_no_users_found: No users match the search criteria
user_form_password_edit_label: New Password (leave empty to keep current)
user_delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
user_password_session_note: This user's active sessions will be ended, and they will need to sign in with the new password.
user_password_err_min: The password must be at least 8 characters
user_password_err_change: An error occurred while changing the password
ticket_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this ticket?
tickets_subtitle: Follow up on complaints and low ratings
tickets_form_notes_placeholder: Write what was done regarding this complaint...
hof_subtitle: Honoring the medical departments with the highest patient ratings
hof_no_data_msg: No data available for this search or filter
audit.details.restore_backup: Successfully restored the database from backup: {{filename}}

error_logs_resolution_notes_placeholder: Write notes about how the issue was resolved...
audit_logs_subtitle: Track user activity, sensitive system changes, and suspicious sign-in attempts.
audit_trend_chart_title: System Activity Volume and Daily Operations (Last 30 Days)
audit_search_placeholder: Search by name, username, or operation details...
audit_no_logs_desc: The system did not find any logs matching the current search filters.

backup_no_filter_results: No results match the current filters
backup_try_changing_filters: Try changing the search filters or
export_no_records_error: No records match the selected export filters.

app_desc_default: An integrated system for collecting and analyzing patient satisfaction surveys intelligently and confidentially to ensure improved healthcare quality.
app_desc_home: Welcome to the Patient Satisfaction Measurement System. Share your opinion to help us strive for excellence in healthcare.
app_desc_survey: Share your feedback and contribute to improving medical services.
app_desc_thank_you: Thank you for sharing your valuable time with us.
app_title_users: Users and Permissions Management | MedSurvey Pro
app_loading_system: Initializing system and loading smart surveys...
dashboard_no_rank_data: No ranking data available for {{dept}} yet.
predictive_alert_message:
⚠️ Early Alert (AI): Satisfaction in {{dept}} dropped from {{prev}}% to {{curr}}%.
Key driver: {{driver}}.
Next prediction: Satisfaction is expected to drop to {{pred}}%.

Please review recent surveys and take necessary actions.
error_fatal_desc: Sorry, MedSurvey Pro encountered an unexpected issue. Error details have been logged for technical review.
landing_feat_survey_desc: Covers all aspects of service from reception to departure
landing_feat_privacy_desc: Your data is protected and encrypted and will not be shared with any party
landing_feat_improve_desc: We use your feedback to continuously develop and improve service quality
hof_msg_first: Congratulations! Your department holds the first place with excellence.
hof_msg_top_3: Great! Your department is among the top three in the hospital.
hof_msg_other: Outstanding performance! We always strive to reach the top and provide the best care for patients.
hof_no_data_desc: No responses or ratings have been recorded for {{dept}} in this period yet.
settings_placeholder_welcome: Welcome to Hospital ... We are happy to hear your opinion...
settings_daily_schedule_desc: The time when the automatic backup will be taken every day (24-hour format).
settings_retention_desc: Backups older than this number of days will be deleted automatically to save space.
settings_gzip_desc: Enabling this option will compress the database backup to save space (recommended).
settings_backup_path_desc: Relative path from the project folder (e.g. storage/app/backups) or absolute path (e.g. C:\backups).
backups_success_restore_local: ✅ تم استعادة قاعدة البيانات بنجاح من "{{filename}}"
backups_success_restore_uploaded: ✅ تم استعادة قاعدة البيانات بنجاح من الملف المرفوع "{{filename}}"
backups_success_restore_external: ✅ تم استعادة قاعدة البيانات بنجاح من الملف الخارجي "{{filename}}"
backups_success_delete: ✅ تم حذف ملف النسخة الاحتياطية "{{filename}}" بنجاح
backups_subtitle: Manage database backups securely and efficiently.
backups_list_empty_hint: انقر على "إنشاء نسخة احتياطية" لبدء النسخ الأول
backups_upload_desc_part1: Upload a backup file from your local machine to restore it.
backups_upload_desc_part2: Only valid SQL or GZIP files are accepted.
backups_external_dir_desc: Scan an external directory for existing backup files.
backups_external_no_files_part1: No valid backup files found in this directory.
backups_info_retention: يتم الاحتفاظ بالنسخ لمدة {{days}} يوماً قبل الحذف التلقائي
backups_confirm_delete_msg1: Are you sure you want to delete this backup?
backups_confirm_restore_upload_msg1: Are you sure you want to restore this uploaded backup?
backups_confirm_restore_upload_msg2: This will overwrite your current database. Make sure you have a recent backup before proceeding.
backups_confirm_restore_ext_msg1: Are you sure you want to restore this external backup?
backups_confirm_restore_ext_msg2: This will overwrite your current database. Make sure you have a recent backup before proceeding.
backups_confirm_restore_local_msg1: Are you sure you want to restore this local backup?
reports_card1_desc: High-level overview of overall satisfaction, total responses, and key performance indicators.
reports_card2_desc: Detailed comparison of satisfaction rates across different medical departments.
reports_card3_desc: Analysis of satisfaction based on specific service categories like medical care and reception.
reports_card4_desc: Overview of open, pending, and resolved tickets generated from patient feedback.
reports_card5_desc: AI-generated insights and early warnings for potential drops in satisfaction.
reports_header_desc: Generate detailed, highly customizable reports for patient satisfaction and quality of care.
reports_filter_dept_restricted: Your access is restricted to specific departments.
ai_dashboard_status_desc: System is actively monitoring responses to provide predictive insights.
monitoring_subtitle: Real-time monitoring of server health, database, and system resources.
monitoring_desc: All systems are running smoothly. No anomalies detected.
predictive_page_desc: Advanced analytics and AI-driven early warnings for patient satisfaction and quality of care.
warning_description_1: The AI detected a potential drop in satisfaction for this department based on recent trends.
no_warnings_desc: All departments are performing well. The AI has not detected any significant negative trends.
ai_insight_desc: Based on the predictive model, activating a proactive plan now can prevent a major drop in patient satisfaction.
ai_insight_desc_2: The system recommends immediate intervention for this department.
action_step_1_desc: Analyze the latest negative feedback to identify the root cause.
action_step_1_desc_2: Focus on wait times and staff behavior.
action_step_2_desc: Discuss the potential drop with the department staff.
action_step_3_desc: Keep a close eye on the department's performance over the next 48 hours.
reports_alert_popup_blocked: Popup blocked! Please allow popups to print the report.
logo_tip: For best results, use a transparent PNG image.
settings_delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this?
settings_delete_warning: Warning: This action cannot be undone.
settings_delete_responses: This will also delete associated responses.
survey_builder_subtitle: Create, edit, and manage patient satisfaction surveys.
survey_delete_responses_warning: Warning: Deleting this survey will also delete all its responses.
name: Name
report_departments_desc: Detailed analysis of each medical department.
report_categories_desc: Analysis of specific services provided to patients.
ticket_monitoring_desc: Monitoring of tickets and complaints generated from patient feedback.
predictive_report_desc: AI-generated insights and early warnings for potential drops in satisfaction.
predictive_ai_analysis: Based on the predictive model, the system is stable with some potential risks identified below.
rec_low_risk: Continue current operations and maintain quality.
rec_high_risk: Immediate intervention required to prevent a major drop in satisfaction.
rec_medium_risk: Monitor closely and conduct team meetings to address potential issues.
